title: bufonia elata
intro: Bufonia elata, also known as Elate Bufonia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Plumbaginaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia, and its medicinal properties have been utilized for centuries. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as protecting against oxidative stress. Bufonia elata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
